news.t: Going for Growth? Consider a Concentrated Approach

holdings.infoBox: BKCG is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.18%, Alphabet at 8.16%, Amazon.com at 7.46%, Microsoft at 5.49%, and Apple at 5.11%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon Concentrated Growth ETF (BKCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests primarily in US large-cap growth companies, focusing on dominant industry leaders with strong growth prospects. The fund aims for long-term capital growth. BKCG was launched on May 14, 2004 and is issued by BNY Mellon.

data.title: Going for Growth? Consider a Concentrated Approach
data.text: Broadly speaking, it's fair to say that 2026 has not played out the way that most advisors and investors expected it to. Geopolitical conflicts have arisen, gas prices remain rocky, and some worry inf...
